pages.text: See the cat.
The cat has a mat.
The cat sits on the mat.
The cat is happy.
This is Sam.
Sam likes to run.
Sam likes the red ball.
Sam plays in the mud.
A red bird lives in a tree.
She wants to build a nest.
She finds green moss and straw.
Three blue eggs are in the nest.
Leo and Mia pack a big bag for the beach.
They build a tall sandcastle with a blue flag.
A cold wave splashes their feet.
They eat sweet watermelon under the umbrella.
I walk in the grass.
I have new red shoes.
Splat! I stepped in poo.
Look at my shoe. It is very yucky!
Now my shoe gets a wash.
See the frog.
The frog jumps.
Toot! The frog farted.
The frog is happy.
I play in the mud.
The mud is on my hands.
The mud is on my face.
I look like a yucky monster.
Time for a bath!
We look in the garden.
What is that green stuff?
It is yucky green slime.
The slime feels cold.
We wash our hands.
A little mouse found a big piece of cheese.
The cheese had holes and it was very yellow.
Oh no, the cheese smelled very bad.
The smell woke up the sleeping cat.
The mouse ran away fast.
See the hippo.
The hippo eats grass.
The hippo eats a lot.
Oops! A loud burp.
My dog runs in the yard.
He does not see the poo.
Splat! He steps on it.
The dog slips on the poo.
Now he needs a wash.
A big bug crawls on the walk.
The bug has red spots on its back.
It makes a funny smell.
The yucky bug crawls away.
We pinch our noses.
A friendly troll lives under a bridge.
He has a very big cold today.
Achoo! The troll sneezes loud.
Green snot flies out of his nose.
He needs a big tissue to clean up.
Sparky was a small green dragon with a big problem. He wanted to roast fluffy white marshmallows for his friends. But his fire was broken today.
Sparky took a deep breath to make fire. He puffed up his big green cheeks. "Here comes the fire!" he said to the knights.
But fire did not come out of his mouth. Instead, Sparky let out a massive, loud burp! A giant cloud of green smoke flew out.
The green smoke smelled like old socks and rotten eggs. The knights pinched their noses tightly. "Phew, that is a smelly burp!" they yelled.
Sparky felt very silly and his face turned red. He burped one more tiny green cloud. "Excuse me," the little dragon mumbled.
The knights started to laugh at the smelly dragon. They ate cold marshmallows instead of roasted ones. It was a very funny afternoon.
Barnaby the rat found a wonderful prize in the kitchen. It was a giant wheel of yellow Swiss cheese. He wanted to keep it all for himself.
Barnaby pushed the heavy cheese behind a tall bookshelf. "No one will find my yummy cheese here," he whispered. He felt very sneaky and smart.
A few days passed and the cheese started to get warm. It began to make a very strange and terrible smell. Wavy green stink lines floated in the air.
The terrible smell drifted through the entire house. The other mice woke up from their naps. "What is that yucky smell?" asked a small mouse.
They followed the smelly green clouds to the bookshelf. They found Barnaby holding his nose next to the stinky cheese. The secret was out!
Barnaby shared the stinky cheese with his hungry friends. It smelled like dirty feet, but it tasted great! Next time, he will not hide his food.
Kraken was a friendly sea monster with long purple tentacles. Today, Kraken was not feeling very well at all. He had a terrible, sniffly cold.
Kraken swam to the surface to get some fresh air. A big pirate ship was sailing right above him. The pirates waved at the friendly monster.
Suddenly, Kraken felt a giant tickle in his nose. He took a huge breath of salty air. "Ah... Ah... ACHOO!" he sneezed loudly.
Thick, green sea-snot blasted out of Kraken's nose. The gooey snot flew through the air and landed on the pirate ship. It covered the wooden deck!
The pirates were completely covered in sticky green slime. They wiped the yucky snot off their faces. "Gross!" shouted the grumpy pirate captain.
Kraken sniffled and waved a tentacle to say sorry. The pirates threw him a giant white tissue. The sea monster blew his nose and swam away.
Captain Fartbeard was the bravest pirate in the ocean. He loved eating massive bowls of baked beans for breakfast. His crew always stood far away from him.
One day, the wind stopped blowing completely. The pirate ship could not move toward the treasure island. The sailors were very worried and sad.
Captain Fartbeard knew exactly what he had to do. He stood at the back of the ship and aimed his bottom. "Hold your noses, crew!" he yelled.
The captain let out a tremendous, roaring fart! TOOT! The loud noise echoed across the entire ocean. A huge cloud of smelly wind rushed out.
The smelly wind caught the white sails perfectly. The pirate ship zoomed across the water very fast. The crew cheered, even though it smelled terrible.
They reached the island and found the shiny gold treasure. Captain Fartbeard's tummy rumbled loudly again. The crew quickly ran away to hide!
Leo, Mia, and Sam were camping in the dark woods. They zipped up their tiny green tent to go to sleep. It was very cozy inside.
Suddenly, a terrible smell filled the tiny tent. It smelled like old garbage and rotten cabbage. Leo woke up and pinched his nose tight.
"Who tooted in the tent?" Leo asked his friends angrily. Mia and Sam woke up and smelled the stinky air. They both shook their heads no.
"It was not me!" shouted Sam. "It was not me either!" yelled Mia. The tent was getting smellier and smellier every single second.
Mia unzipped the tent door to let some fresh air inside. A black and white skunk was sleeping right on the porch! The mystery was solved.
The kids laughed quietly at their silly mistake. They carefully zipped the tent back up so they would not wake the smelly skunk.
Bob the bear loves to eat baked beans.
He eats a big bowl of beans for his lunch.
Bob feels a funny rumble deep in his tummy.
"Oh no!" says Bob. "TOOT!" goes his bottom.
The loud toot blows Bob high up into a tall tree.
The birds laugh at the silly, smelly, farting bear.
See the pig.
The pig is big.
See the funny wig.
The pig is happy.
This is a rat.
The rat is fat.
The rat has a hat.
The rat sits on a mat.
A white bunny hops in the grass.
The bunny finds an orange carrot.
The bunny eats the very big carrot.
The bunny is very full and happy.
Princess Pam has a grand royal ball today.
She wears a beautiful pink dress and shiny new shoes.
Pam walks through the magic unicorn garden.
Squish! Splat! Pam steps right in colorful unicorn poo.
"Yuck!" says Pam. Her shiny shoe is very smelly.
Pam washes her stinky shoe in the pond before the ball.
Max the monkey loves to play in the wet dirt.
He mixes dirt and water to make a big mud pie.
Max sees his friend Leo the lion fast asleep.
Splat! Max throws the mud pie right on Leo's nose.
Leo wakes up and sneezes very loud. "Achoo!"
Green snot flies everywhere and covers silly Max.
Now both friends need a long scrub in the river.
This is page 1 of A.
This is page 2 of A.
